title: Windows WMI Event Subscription Persistence
description: Detects creation of WMI event subscriptions for persistence, allowing attackers to execute code triggered by system events.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*__EventFilter*' or 'Command Line' like '*__EventConsumer*' or 'Command Line' like '*__FilterToConsumerBinding*' or 'Command Line' like '*ActiveScriptEventConsumer*' or 'Command Line' like '*CommandLineEventConsumer*')) or (('Command Line' like '*Set-WmiInstance*' or 'Command Line' like '*Register-WmiEvent*' or 'Command Line' like '*New-CimInstance -ClassName __*')))
